questions.question: Why is an email list considered 'Owned Land' vs. social media 'Rented Land'?

options.text: Email is cheaper than social media ads
You control the distribution; social algorithms can cut your reach overnight
It is easier to design pretty emails
Social media is for old people

questions.explanation: Social platforms can ban you or change algorithms at any time. Your email list is a portable asset that you own and can bring to any platform.

questions.question: What is a 'Lead Magnet'?

options.text: A physical magnet you mail to customers
A generic request to 'Join my newsletter'
A specific solution (template, checklist, course) given in exchange for contact info
A sales call

questions.explanation: A Lead Magnet trades value for data. It must solve a specific problem quickly to be effective.

questions.question: Which of these is the LEAST effective way to build a list?

options.text: A specific checklist for a specific problem
A generic 'Sign up for updates' form
A 5-day email mini-course
A Notion template

questions.explanation: Generic promises like 'updates' offer no immediate value. High-converting magnets solve immediate pain.

questions.question: What is the 'Content Upgrade' strategy?

options.text: Charging people to read your tweets
Posting 80% of the value on social, and offering the final 20% (asset) in exchange for an email
Upgrading your LinkedIn Premium account
Writing longer posts

questions.explanation: Content Upgrades convert attention (casual readers) into retention (subscribers) by offering a relevant asset that completes the lesson they just read.

questions.question: Social media is primarily for ____; Email is primarily for ____.

options.text: Sales; Fun
Discovery; Relationship & Sales
Politics; Work
Images; Text

questions.explanation: Use social media's algorithm to get found (Discovery), then move them to email to deepen trust and sell (Relationship).

questions.question: Brainstorm one Lead Magnet for your specific audience. What is an 'Annoying Task' they hate, and what Template or Checklist could you create to solve it?
questions.promptForAI: Evaluate the lead magnet idea. Is it specific? Does it solve a real pain point? Is it a quick win (template/checklist) vs. a heavy ebook?
